titleStmt.title: SII 22.173: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 173. (A.R. No. 173 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE WALL OF THE OUTER GŌPURA, RIGHT OF ENTRANCE. ŚRĪRAṄGADĒVA-MAHĀRĀJA I—ŚAKA 1504.

summary.p: The details of the date are Chitrabhānu, Kārttigai 13, Monday, dvādaśi, corresponding to A.D. 1582, November 12.

The epigraph is badly damaged in the latter portion. It seems to record the renovation of certain parts of the temple like tank and the gōpura, and to make provision for the renewal of worship in the two shrines (of the god and goddess) by order of Veṅkappar Lingarājayyaṉ probably an officer of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran Ariyarāya
vipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkuttappuvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ muvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ
kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu koṭātāṉ metiṉi
micurakaṇṭaṉ kaṭṭāri cāḷuva tulukkā taṉavipāṭaṉ Emma
ṇṭalamum koṇṭa rācātirāca Irācaparameśvaran śrī virappiratāpa
ṉ virakecari pūṟuvate[kṣi]ṇapaccima Uttara catucamuttirātipatikeca veṭ
ṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya śrī ciraṅkatevamakā Irāyar piṟutuvirācciyam
paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa cakāktam 1000 5 100 4 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa
cittiṟapāṉu varuṣam kāttikai mātam mātam 10 3 tiyati comavāramum peṟṟa tuvāteci
yum peṟṟanāḷ veṅkappar liṅkarācaiyaṉ kaṭṭaḷai Iṭukaiyil
tipparacar mallapparum Ayyaṅkā rum cilaācātaṉa
m paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Iṟaivāṉaṟaiyūr kuḷamumk kopuramum
paṭṭuppokaiyil
cittiṟapāṉu varuṣattukku[p pokiṟa viṣu] varuṣattukku
caṟuvamāṉiyam Amutupaṭikku
Iṟuttukkuṭuttu
paṇṇikkoṇṭu
Iraṇṭu koyilum Uṭai
paṇṇivittukkoṇṭu cukattile yirukka
vum Itukku yātoruvar Akitam paṇṇiṉavarka
ḷ kaṅkaikaraiyil kārāmpacuvai ko
ṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭavārākavum
Digital edition of SII 22.173 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
